name: McEwen Inc.
description: McEwen Inc. (formerly McEwen Mining Inc.) is a gold and silver producer with operations in Ontario and Manitoba, Canada (Fox Complex), Nevada, USA (Gold Bar mine), and a 49% stake in the San Jose silver-gold mine in Argentina. The company also holds a 46.4% interest in McEwen Copper, owner of the Los Azules copper development project in San Juan, Argentina. McEwen is targeting 250,000 to 300,000 gold equivalent ounces of annual production by 2030, approximately double its current output.
